original_query: SELECT t.EXPR0, 2 + 3 AS f1, MAX(t.FIVE) FROM EMP, (VALUES (4, 5)) AS t (EXPR0, FIVE) GROUP BY t.EXPR0, 2 + 3
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.EXPR0, 5 AS f1, MAX(t.FIVE) FROM emp,         (VALUES (4, 5)) AS t (EXPR0, FIVE),         (VALUES (4)) AS t0 (EXPR0) GROUP BY t0.EXPR0;

original_query: SELECT NAME FROM DEPT WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 2 * DEPTNO AS f0 FROM DEPT GROUP BY 2 * DEPTNO) AS t0 WHERE DEPT.DEPTNO = t0.f0)
rewritten_query: SELECT dept.name FROM dept     INNER JOIN (SELECT 2 * deptno0 AS f0, TRUE AS f1         FROM dept AS dept0 (deptno0, name0)         GROUP BY 2 * deptno0         HAVING 2 * deptno0 IS NOT NULL) AS t2 ON dept.deptno = t2.f0;

original_query: SELECT EMP.SAL + BONUS.COMM, SUM(BONUS.SAL + BONUS.SAL + 100) OVER (PARTITION BY BONUS.JOB RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) FROM EMP INNER JOIN BONUS ON EMP.ENAME = BONUS.ENAME AND EMP.DEPTNO = 10
rewritten_query: SELECT emp.sal + bonus0.comm0, SUM(bonus0.sal0 + bonus0.sal0 + 100) OVER (PARTITION BY bonus0.job0 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) FROM emp,     bonus AS bonus0 (ename0, job0, sal0, comm0) WHERE emp.ename = bonus0.ename0 AND emp.deptno = 10;

original_query: SELECT NAME FROM (SELECT DEPTNO, NAME FROM DEPT WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 2 * DEPTNO AS f0 FROM DEPT GROUP BY 2 * DEPTNO) AS t5 WHERE DEPTNO = t5.f0)) AS t2
rewritten_query: SELECT dept.name FROM dept     INNER JOIN (SELECT 2 * deptno0 AS f0, TRUE AS f1         FROM dept AS dept0 (deptno0, name0)         GROUP BY 2 * deptno0         HAVING 2 * deptno0 IS NOT NULL) AS t2 ON dept.deptno = t2.f0;

original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT UPPER(SUBSTRING(X FROM 1 FOR 2) || SUBSTRING(X FROM 3)) AS U, SUBSTRING(X FROM 1 FOR 1) AS S FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT 'table' AS X FROM (VALUES (TRUE)) AS t (EXPR0) UNION SELECT 'view' AS EXPR0 FROM (VALUES (TRUE)) AS t (EXPR0)) AS t UNION SELECT 'foreign table' AS EXPR0 FROM (VALUES (TRUE)) AS t (EXPR0)) AS t6) AS t7 WHERE U = 'TABLE'
rewritten_query: SELECT UPPER(SUBSTRING(X, 1, 2) || SUBSTRING(X, 3)) AS U, SUBSTRING(X, 1, 1) AS S FROM (SELECT X             FROM (SELECT *                         FROM (VALUES ('table')) AS t (X)                         UNION ALL                         SELECT *                         FROM (VALUES ('view')) AS t (EXPR0)) AS t1             GROUP BY X             UNION ALL             SELECT *             FROM (VALUES ('foreign table')) AS t (EXPR0)) AS t4 GROUP BY X HAVING UPPER(SUBSTRING(X, 1, 2) || SUBSTRING(X, 3)) = 'TABLE';

original_query: SELECT t6.ENAME FROM (SELECT JOB FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB) AS t5 LEFT JOIN (SELECT ENAME, JOB FROM EMP GROUP BY ENAME, JOB) AS t6 ON t5.JOB = t6.JOB GROUP BY t6.ENAME
rewritten_query: SELECT t1.ename0 FROM (SELECT job         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job) AS t0     LEFT JOIN (SELECT ename0, job0         FROM emp AS emp0 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0)         GROUP BY ename0, job0) AS t1 ON t0.job = t1.job0 GROUP BY t1.ename0;

original_query: SELECT t2.EMPNO, t2.ENAME, t2.JOB, t2.MGR, t2.HIREDATE, t2.SAL, t2.COMM, t2.DEPTNO, t2.SLACKER, t3.DEPTNO AS DEPTNO0, t3.NAME FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO, SLACKER FROM EMP ORDER BY SAL) AS t2 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM DEPT) AS t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO ORDER BY t2.SAL FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM emp,     dept AS dept0 (deptno0, name) WHERE emp.deptno = dept0.deptno0 ORDER BY emp.sal FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY;

original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO = EMPNO) AS t1 INNER JOIN DEPT AS DEPT0 ON t1.DEPTNO = DEPT0.DEPTNO
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *         FROM emp         WHERE deptno = empno) AS t0,     dept AS dept0 (deptno0, name) WHERE t0.deptno = dept0.deptno0;

original_query: SELECT t2.EMPNO, t2.ENAME, t2.JOB, t2.MGR, t2.HIREDATE, t2.SAL, t2.COMM, t2.DEPTNO, t2.SLACKER, t3.DEPTNO AS DEPTNO0, t3.NAME FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO, SLACKER FROM EMP ORDER BY SAL FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY) AS t2 LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM DEPT) AS t3 ON t2.DEPTNO = t3.DEPTNO ORDER BY t2.SAL FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT empno, ename, job, mgr, hiredate, sal, comm, deptno, slacker         FROM emp         ORDER BY sal         FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY) AS t     LEFT JOIN dept AS dept0 (deptno0, name) ON t.deptno = dept0.deptno0 ORDER BY t.sal FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY;

original_query: SELECT SUM(100) OVER (PARTITION BY DEPTNO, SAL ORDER BY SAL RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS COL1, SUM(100) OVER (PARTITION BY SAL ORDER BY DEPTNO RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS COL2, SUM(SAL) OVER (PARTITION BY DEPTNO ORDER BY SAL RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS COL3 FROM EMP WHERE SAL = 5000
rewritten_query: SELECT SUM(100) OVER (PARTITION BY deptno, 5000 ORDER BY 5000 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS COL1, SUM(100) OVER (PARTITION BY 5000 ORDER BY deptno RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS COL2, SUM(5000) OVER (PARTITION BY deptno ORDER BY 5000 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS COL3 FROM emp WHERE sal = 5000;

original_query: SELECT t0.JOB FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO, SLACKER, DEPTNO + EMPNO AS f9 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A') AS t0 FULL JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO, NAME, DEPTNO + 5 AS f2 FROM DEPT) AS t1 ON t0.JOB = t1.NAME AND t0.f9 = t1.f2 GROUP BY t0.JOB
rewritten_query: SELECT t1.JOB FROM (SELECT job AS JOB, deptno + empno AS f9         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A') AS t1     FULL JOIN (SELECT name, deptno0 + 5 AS f2         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)) AS t3 ON t1.JOB = t3.name AND t1.f9 = t3.f2 GROUP BY t1.JOB;

original_query: SELECT t6.NAME FROM (SELECT JOB FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB) AS t5 LEFT JOIN (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t6 ON t5.JOB = t6.NAME GROUP BY t6.NAME
rewritten_query: SELECT t1.name FROM (SELECT job         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job) AS t0     LEFT JOIN (SELECT name         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name) AS t1 ON t0.job = t1.name GROUP BY t1.name;

original_query: SELECT t8.NAME FROM (SELECT JOB, DEPTNO + EMPNO AS f9 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB, DEPTNO + EMPNO) AS t6 LEFT JOIN (SELECT NAME, DEPTNO + 5 AS f2 FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME, DEPTNO + 5) AS t8 ON t6.JOB = t8.NAME AND t6.f9 = t8.f2 GROUP BY t8.NAME
rewritten_query: SELECT t4.name FROM (SELECT job AS JOB, deptno + empno AS f9         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job, deptno + empno) AS t1     LEFT JOIN (SELECT name, deptno0 + 5 AS f2         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name, deptno0 + 5         HAVING deptno0 + 5 IS NOT NULL) AS t4 ON t1.JOB = t4.name AND t1.f9 = t4.f2 GROUP BY t4.name;

original_query: SELECT t6.JOB, t8.NAME FROM (SELECT JOB, DEPTNO + EMPNO AS f9 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB, DEPTNO + EMPNO) AS t6 LEFT JOIN (SELECT NAME, DEPTNO + 5 AS f2 FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME, DEPTNO + 5) AS t8 ON t6.JOB = t8.NAME AND t6.f9 = t8.f2 GROUP BY t6.JOB, t8.NAME
rewritten_query: SELECT t1.JOB, t4.name FROM (SELECT job AS JOB, deptno + empno AS f9         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job, deptno + empno) AS t1     LEFT JOIN (SELECT name, deptno0 + 5 AS f2         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name, deptno0 + 5         HAVING deptno0 + 5 IS NOT NULL) AS t4 ON t1.JOB = t4.name AND t1.f9 = t4.f2 GROUP BY t1.JOB, t4.name;

original_query: SELECT COUNT(C) FILTER (WHERE g_0_f_1), COUNT(D) FILTER (WHERE g_0_f_0) FROM (SELECT SAL > 1000 AS C, SAL < 500 AS D, GROUPING(SAL > 1000, SAL < 500) = 0 AND SAL > 1000 AS g_0_f_0, GROUPING(SAL > 1000, SAL < 500) = 0 AND SAL < 500 AS g_0_f_1 FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL > 1000, SAL < 500) AS t3
rewritten_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE g_0_f_1), COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE g_0_f_0) FROM (SELECT sal > 1000 AS C, GROUPING(sal > 1000, sal < 500) = 0 AND sal < 500 AS g_0_f_1, sal < 500 AS D, GROUPING(sal > 1000, sal < 500) = 0 AND sal > 1000 AS g_0_f_0         FROM emp         GROUP BY sal > 1000, sal < 500) AS t1;

original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPTNO, NAME FROM DEPT WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP) AS t4 WHERE DEPTNO = t4.DEPTNO) ORDER BY DEPTNO) AS t3 ORDER BY DEPTNO OFFSET 2 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
rewritten_query: SELECT dept.deptno, dept.name FROM dept,         (SELECT t1.i         FROM (SELECT *                 FROM (SELECT deptno0                         FROM emp AS emp (empno, ename, job, mgr, hiredate, sal, comm, deptno0, slacker)) AS t                 WHERE deptno0 = deptno0) AS t0,                 (VALUES (TRUE)) AS t1 (i)         GROUP BY t1.i) AS t3 ORDER BY dept.deptno OFFSET 2 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY;

original_query: SELECT t0.SAL + t1.COMM, SUM(t1.EXPR0) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.JOB RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) FROM (SELECT ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO = 10 AS EXPR0 FROM EMP) AS t0 INNER JOIN (SELECT ENAME, JOB, COMM, SAL + SAL + 100 AS EXPR0 FROM BONUS) AS t1 ON t0.ENAME = t1.ENAME AND t0.EXPR0
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.SAL + t1.comm0 AS 2, SUM(t1.EXPR0) OVER (PARTITION BY t1.job0 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS w0o0 FROM (SELECT *         FROM (SELECT ename AS ENAME, sal AS SAL, deptno = 10 AS EXPR0                 FROM emp) AS t         WHERE EXPR0) AS t0,         (SELECT ename0, job0, comm0, sal0 + sal0 + 100 AS EXPR0         FROM bonus AS bonus (ename0, job0, sal0, comm0)) AS t1 WHERE t0.ENAME = t1.ename0;

original_query: SELECT t2.JOB, t2.MIN_SAL, t2.MIN_DEPTNO, CAST(t2.SUM_SAL_2 * t3.f1 AS INTEGER) + 1 AS SUM_SAL_PLUS, t2.MAX_SAL, CAST(t2.SUM_SAL_2 * t3.f1 AS INTEGER) AS SUM_SAL_2, t2.COUNT_SAL * t3.f1 AS COUNT_SAL, t2.COUNT_MGR * t3.f1 AS COUNT_MGR FROM (SELECT JOB, MIN(SAL) AS MIN_SAL, MIN(DEPTNO) AS MIN_DEPTNO, SUM(SAL) AS SUM_SAL_2, MAX(SAL) AS MAX_SAL, COUNT(*) AS COUNT_SAL, COUNT(MGR) AS COUNT_MGR FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB) AS t2 INNER JOIN (SELECT NAME, COUNT(*) AS f1 FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t3 ON t2.JOB = t3.NAME
rewritten_query: SELECT t.job, t.MIN_SAL, t.MIN_DEPTNO, t.SUM_SAL_2 * t0.f1 + 1 AS SUM_SAL_PLUS, t.MAX_SAL, t.SUM_SAL_2 * t0.f1 AS SUM_SAL_2, t.COUNT_SAL * t0.f1 AS COUNT_SAL, t.COUNT_MGR * t0.f1 AS COUNT_MGR FROM (SELECT job, MIN(sal) AS MIN_SAL, MIN(deptno) AS MIN_DEPTNO, SUM(sal) AS SUM_SAL_2, MAX(sal) AS MAX_SAL, COUNT(*) AS COUNT_SAL, COUNT(mgr) AS COUNT_MGR         FROM emp         GROUP BY job) AS t,         (SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS f1         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name) AS t0 WHERE t.job = t0.name;

original_query: SELECT EMP0.ENAME FROM (SELECT * FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A') AS t0 LEFT JOIN EMP AS EMP0 ON t0.JOB = EMP0.JOB GROUP BY EMP0.ENAME
rewritten_query: SELECT emp00.ename0 FROM (SELECT *         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A') AS t     LEFT JOIN emp AS emp00 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0) ON t.job = emp00.job0 GROUP BY emp00.ename0;

original_query: SELECT t0.JOB FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO, SLACKER, DEPTNO + EMPNO AS f9 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A') AS t0 LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO, NAME, DEPTNO + 5 AS f2 FROM DEPT) AS t1 ON t0.JOB = t1.NAME AND t0.f9 = t1.f2 GROUP BY t0.JOB
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.JOB FROM (SELECT empno AS EMPNO, ename AS ENAME, job AS JOB, mgr AS MGR, hiredate AS HIREDATE, sal AS SAL, comm AS COMM, deptno AS DEPTNO, slacker AS SLACKER, deptno + empno AS f9         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A') AS t0     LEFT JOIN (SELECT deptno0, name, deptno0 + 5 AS f2         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)) AS t1 ON t0.JOB = t1.name AND t0.f9 = t1.f2 GROUP BY t0.JOB;

original_query: SELECT t0.SAL FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, SLACKER, SAL AS SAL0, SAL = 4 AS f9 FROM EMPNULLABLES WHERE DEPTNO = 20 AND SAL > 1000) AS t0 INNER JOIN (SELECT t2.SAL, t5.SAL AS SAL0, t5.f9 FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, SLACKER FROM EMPNULLABLES WHERE DEPTNO = 20 AND SAL > 1000) AS t2 INNER JOIN (SELECT SAL, SAL = 4 AS f9 FROM EMPNULLABLES WHERE DEPTNO = 20 AND SAL > 1000 GROUP BY SAL, SAL = 4) AS t5 ON t2.SAL = t5.SAL OR t5.f9 GROUP BY t2.SAL, t5.SAL, t5.f9 HAVING t5.SAL = t2.SAL) AS t8 ON t0.SAL = t8.SAL0 AND t0.f9 = t8.f9
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.SAL FROM (SELECT empno AS EMPNO, ename AS ENAME, job AS JOB, mgr AS MGR, hiredate AS HIREDATE, sal AS SAL, comm AS COMM, slacker AS SLACKER, sal AS SAL0, CAST(FALSE AS BOOLEAN) AS f9         FROM empnullables         WHERE deptno = 20 AND sal > 1000) AS t0     INNER JOIN (SELECT sal0, sal1, f9         FROM (SELECT t2.sal0, t6.sal1, t6.f9                 FROM (SELECT empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, slacker0                         FROM empnullables AS empnullables0 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0)                         WHERE deptno0 = 20 AND sal0 > 1000) AS t2                     INNER JOIN (SELECT sal1, CAST(FALSE AS BOOLEAN) AS f9                         FROM empnullables AS empnullables1 (empno1, ename1, job1, mgr1, hiredate1, sal1, comm1, deptno1, slacker1)                         WHERE deptno1 = 20 AND sal1 > 1000                         GROUP BY sal1) AS t6 ON t2.sal0 = t6.sal1 OR t6.f9) AS t7         WHERE t7.sal1 = t7.sal0         GROUP BY sal0, sal1, f9) AS t9 ON t0.SAL = t9.sal1 AND t0.f9 = t9.f9;

original_query: SELECT SUM(CAST(t3.f1 * t4.SAL AS INTEGER)) FROM (SELECT SAL, COUNT(*) AS f1 FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL) AS t3 INNER JOIN (SELECT SAL FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL) AS t4 ON t3.SAL = t4.SAL
rewritten_query: SELECT SUM(t.f1 * t0.sal0) FROM (SELECT sal, COUNT(*) AS f1         FROM emp         GROUP BY sal) AS t,         (SELECT sal0         FROM emp AS emp0 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0)         GROUP BY sal0) AS t0 WHERE t.sal = t0.sal0;

original_query: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(t5.f2 * t6.f1), 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(SUM(CAST(t5.EXPR0 * t6.f1 AS INTEGER)), 0) END FROM (SELECT JOB, COALESCE(SUM(SAL), 0) AS EXPR0, COUNT(*) AS f2 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB) AS t5 INNER JOIN (SELECT NAME, COUNT(*) AS f1 FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t6 ON t5.JOB = t6.NAME
rewritten_query: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(t0.f2 * t1.f1), 0) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(SUM(t0.f1 * t1.f1), 0) END AS f00 FROM (SELECT job, SUM(sal) AS f1, COUNT(*) AS f2         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job) AS t0,         (SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS f1         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name) AS t1 WHERE t0.job = t1.name;

original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPT.DEPTNO, DEPT.NAME FROM DEPT INNER JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO) AS t0 ON DEPT.DEPTNO = t0.DEPTNO) AS t1 WHERE t1.DEPTNO <= 10
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT *         FROM dept         WHERE deptno <= 10 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1                 FROM (SELECT deptno0                         FROM emp AS emp (empno, ename, job, mgr, hiredate, sal, comm, deptno0, slacker)) AS t0                 WHERE deptno = t0.deptno0)) AS t;

original_query: SELECT t0.SAL + t1.COMM FROM (SELECT ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO = 10 AS EXPR0 FROM EMP) AS t0 INNER JOIN (SELECT ENAME, COMM FROM BONUS) AS t1 ON t0.ENAME = t1.ENAME AND t0.EXPR0
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.SAL + t1.comm0 FROM (SELECT *         FROM (SELECT ename AS ENAME, sal AS SAL, deptno = 10 AS EXPR0                 FROM emp) AS t         WHERE EXPR0) AS t0,         (SELECT ename0, comm0         FROM bonus AS bonus (ename0, job0, sal0, comm0)) AS t1 WHERE t0.ENAME = t1.ename0;

original_query: SELECT t5.JOB FROM (SELECT JOB FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB) AS t5 FULL JOIN (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t6 ON t5.JOB = t6.NAME GROUP BY t5.JOB
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.job FROM (SELECT job         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job) AS t0     FULL JOIN (SELECT name         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name) AS t1 ON t0.job = t1.name GROUP BY t0.job;

original_query: SELECT MIN(EXPR0) FILTER (WHERE g_3), COUNT(SAL) FILTER (WHERE g_0_f_1) FROM (SELECT SAL, SUM(COMM) AS EXPR0, GROUPING(SAL, SAL > 1000) = 0 AND SAL > 1000 IS TRUE AS g_0_f_1, GROUPING(SAL, SAL > 1000) = 3 AS g_3 FROM EMP GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((SAL, SAL > 1000), ())) AS t3
rewritten_query: SELECT MIN(EXPR0) FILTER (WHERE g_3), COUNT(SAL) FILTER (WHERE g_0_f_1) FROM (SELECT SAL, SUM(COMM) AS EXPR0, GROUPING(SAL, SAL > 1000) = 0 AND SAL > 1000 IS TRUE AS g_0_f_1, GROUPING(SAL, SAL > 1000) = 3 AS g_3 FROM EMP GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((SAL, SAL > 1000), ())) AS t3

original_query: SELECT ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO FROM (SELECT ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO FROM EMP GROUP BY ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO HAVING SAL > 5000) AS t4 GROUP BY ROLLUP(ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO)
rewritten_query: SELECT ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO FROM (SELECT ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO         FROM (SELECT ename AS ENAME, sal AS SAL, deptno AS DEPTNO                 FROM emp) AS t         WHERE SAL > 5000         GROUP BY ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO) AS t1 GROUP BY ROLLUP(ENAME, SAL, DEPTNO);

original_query: SELECT t6.JOB FROM (SELECT JOB, DEPTNO + EMPNO AS f9 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB, DEPTNO + EMPNO) AS t6 FULL JOIN (SELECT NAME, DEPTNO + 5 AS f2 FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME, DEPTNO + 5) AS t8 ON t6.JOB = t8.NAME AND t6.f9 = t8.f2 GROUP BY t6.JOB
rewritten_query: SELECT t1.JOB FROM (SELECT job AS JOB, deptno + empno AS f9         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job, deptno + empno) AS t1     FULL JOIN (SELECT name, deptno0 + 5 AS f2         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name, deptno0 + 5) AS t3 ON t1.JOB = t3.name AND t1.f9 = t3.f2 GROUP BY t1.JOB;

original_query: SELECT MGR, SUM(SUM_SAL) FROM (SELECT MGR, SUM(SAL) AS SUM_SAL FROM EMP GROUP BY MGR, DEPTNO HAVING DEPTNO = 100) AS t2 GROUP BY MGR
rewritten_query: SELECT MGR, SUM(SUM_SAL) FROM (SELECT MGR, deptno, SUM(sal) AS SUM_SAL         FROM (SELECT mgr AS MGR, deptno, sal                 FROM emp) AS t         WHERE deptno = 100         GROUP BY MGR, deptno) AS t1 GROUP BY MGR;

original_query: SELECT t5.ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME, JOB FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY ENAME, JOB) AS t5 LEFT JOIN (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t6 ON t5.JOB = t6.NAME GROUP BY t5.ENAME
rewritten_query: SELECT ENAME FROM (SELECT ename AS ENAME         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY ename, job) AS t2 GROUP BY ENAME;

original_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t1.EXPR0 * t2.EXPR0), 0) FROM (SELECT JOB, COUNT(*) AS EXPR0 FROM EMP GROUP BY JOB) AS t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT NAME, COUNT(*) AS EXPR0 FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t2 ON t1.JOB = t2.NAME
rewritten_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(t.EXPR0 * t0.EXPR0), 0) AS f0 FROM (SELECT job, COUNT(*) AS EXPR0         FROM emp         GROUP BY job) AS t     INNER JOIN (SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS EXPR0         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name) AS t0 ON t.job = t0.name;

original_query: SELECT t6.JOB, CAST(t6.EXPR1 * t7.f1 AS INTEGER) FROM (SELECT JOB, SUM(SAL) AS EXPR1 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB) AS t6 INNER JOIN (SELECT NAME, COUNT(*) AS f1 FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t7 ON t6.JOB = t7.NAME
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.job, t0.EXPR1 * t1.f1 FROM (SELECT job, SUM(sal) AS EXPR1         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job) AS t0,         (SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS f1         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name) AS t1 WHERE t0.job = t1.name;

original_query: SELECT NAME, CAST(SUM(CN) FILTER (WHERE g_1) AS BIGINT), CAST(SUM(SM) FILTER (WHERE g_2) AS INTEGER) FROM (SELECT NAME, CN, SM, GROUPING(NAME, CN, SM) = 1 AS g_1, GROUPING(NAME, CN, SM) = 2 AS g_2 FROM (SELECT NAME, COUNT(*) AS CN, SUM(DEPTNO) AS SM FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t3 GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((NAME, CN), (NAME, SM))) AS t5 GROUP BY NAME
rewritten_query: SELECT NAME, SUM(CN) FILTER (WHERE g_1) AS f1, SUM(SM) FILTER (WHERE g_2) AS f2 FROM (SELECT name AS NAME, CN, GROUPING(name, CN, SM) = 1 AS g_1, SM, GROUPING(name, CN, SM) = 2 AS g_2         FROM (SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS CN, SUM(deptno) AS SM                 FROM dept                 GROUP BY name) AS t         GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((name, CN), (name, SM))) AS t1 GROUP BY NAME;

original_query: SELECT SUM(SAL) AS SUM_SAL, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN JOB = 'CLERK' THEN DEPTNO ELSE NULL END) AS COUNT_DISTINCT_CLERK, SUM(CASE WHEN DEPTNO = 10 THEN SAL ELSE NULL END) AS SUM_SAL_D10, SUM(CASE WHEN DEPTNO = 20 THEN SAL ELSE 0 END) AS SUM_SAL_D20, SUM(CASE WHEN DEPTNO = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS COUNT_D30, COUNT(CASE WHEN DEPTNO = 40 THEN 'x' ELSE NULL END) AS COUNT_D40, SUM(CASE WHEN DEPTNO = 45 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS COUNT_D45, SUM(CASE WHEN DEPTNO = 50 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS COUNT_D50, SUM(CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(19, 9))) AS SUM_NULL_D60, SUM(CASE WHEN DEPTNO = 70 THEN NULL ELSE 1 END) AS SUM_NULL_D70, COUNT(CASE WHEN DEPTNO = 20 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS COUNT_D20 FROM EMP
rewritten_query: SELECT SUM(sal) AS SUM_SAL, COUNT(DISTINCT deptno) FILTER (WHERE job = 'CLERK') AS COUNT_DISTINCT_CLERK, SUM(sal) FILTER (WHERE deptno = 10) AS SUM_SAL_D10, SUM(CASE WHEN deptno = 20 THEN sal ELSE 0 END) AS SUM_SAL_D20, SUM(CASE WHEN deptno = 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS COUNT_D30, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE deptno = 40) AS COUNT_D40, SUM(1) FILTER (WHERE deptno = 45) AS COUNT_D45, SUM(1) FILTER (WHERE deptno = 50) AS COUNT_D50, SUM(CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(19, 9))) AS SUM_NULL_D60, SUM(1) FILTER (WHERE deptno <> 70) AS SUM_NULL_D70, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE deptno = 20) AS COUNT_D20 FROM emp;

original_query: SELECT t6.JOB FROM (SELECT JOB, DEPTNO + EMPNO AS f9 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB, DEPTNO + EMPNO) AS t6 LEFT JOIN (SELECT NAME, DEPTNO + 5 AS f2 FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME, DEPTNO + 5) AS t8 ON t6.JOB = t8.NAME AND t6.f9 = t8.f2 GROUP BY t6.JOB
rewritten_query: SELECT JOB FROM (SELECT job AS JOB         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job, deptno + empno) AS t2 GROUP BY JOB;

original_query: SELECT t12.SAL FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, SLACKER, SAL AS SAL0, SAL = 4 AS f9 FROM EMPNULLABLES WHERE DEPTNO = 20 AND SAL > 1000) AS t11 WHERE SAL > 1000) AS t12 INNER JOIN (SELECT t14.SAL, t17.SAL AS SAL0, t17.f9 FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, SLACKER FROM EMPNULLABLES WHERE DEPTNO = 20 AND SAL > 1000) AS t14 INNER JOIN (SELECT SAL, SAL = 4 AS f9 FROM EMPNULLABLES WHERE DEPTNO = 20 AND SAL > 1000 GROUP BY SAL, SAL = 4) AS t17 ON t14.SAL = t17.SAL OR t17.f9 GROUP BY t14.SAL, t17.SAL, t17.f9 HAVING t17.SAL = t14.SAL) AS t20 ON t12.SAL = t20.SAL0 AND t12.f9 = t20.f9
rewritten_query: SELECT cor0.SAL FROM (SELECT empno AS EMPNO, ename AS ENAME, job AS JOB, mgr AS MGR, hiredate AS HIREDATE, sal AS SAL, comm AS COMM, slacker AS SLACKER, sal AS SAL0, CAST(FALSE AS BOOLEAN) AS f9         FROM (SELECT *                 FROM empnullables                 WHERE deptno = 20 AND sal > 1000) AS t         WHERE sal > 1000) AS cor0,     LATERAL (SELECT sal0, sal1, f9         FROM (SELECT *                 FROM (SELECT empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, slacker0                         FROM empnullables AS empnullables0 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0)                         WHERE deptno0 = 20 AND sal0 > 1000) AS cor1,                     LATERAL (SELECT sal1, CAST(FALSE AS BOOLEAN) AS f9                         FROM empnullables AS empnullables1 (empno1, ename1, job1, mgr1, hiredate1, sal1, comm1, deptno1, slacker1)                         WHERE deptno1 = 20 AND sal1 > 1000                         GROUP BY sal1, CAST(FALSE AS BOOLEAN)) AS t8                 WHERE cor1.sal0 = t8.sal1 OR t8.f9) AS t9         WHERE t9.sal1 = t9.sal0         GROUP BY sal0, sal1, f9) AS t12 WHERE cor0.SAL = t12.sal1 AND cor0.f9 = t12.f9;

original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO < 4) AS t7 INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP WHERE DEPTNO > 7 UNION ALL SELECT DEPTNO FROM EMP) AS t11 WHERE DEPTNO < 4) AS t12 ON t7.DEPTNO = t12.DEPTNO
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT deptno AS DEPTNO         FROM emp         WHERE deptno < 4) AS t0,         (SELECT *             FROM (SELECT deptno0                     FROM emp AS emp0 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0)                     WHERE deptno0 > 7) AS t2             WHERE deptno0 < 4             UNION ALL             SELECT *             FROM (SELECT deptno1                     FROM emp AS emp1 (empno1, ename1, job1, mgr1, hiredate1, sal1, comm1, deptno1, slacker1)) AS t4             WHERE deptno1 < 4) AS t6 WHERE t0.DEPTNO = t6.deptno0;

original_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(EXPR0), 0), T2 FROM (SELECT t5.T2, COUNT(CASE WHEN EMP1.DEPTNO = 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS EXPR0 FROM EMP AS EMP1, (VALUES (1)) AS t5 (T2) GROUP BY t5.T2 UNION ALL SELECT t8.T2, COUNT(CASE WHEN EMP2.DEPTNO = 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS EXPR0 FROM EMP AS EMP2, (VALUES (2)) AS t8 (T2) GROUP BY t8.T2) AS t11 GROUP BY T2
rewritten_query: SELECT SUM(EXPR0) AS f1, T2 FROM (SELECT t0.T2, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE emp.deptno = 0) AS EXPR0             FROM emp,                     (VALUES (1)) AS t (T2),                     (VALUES (1)) AS t0 (T2)             GROUP BY t0.T2             UNION ALL             SELECT t4.T2 AS T20, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE emp00.deptno0 = 0) AS EXPR0             FROM emp AS emp00 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0),                     (VALUES (2)) AS t3 (T2),                     (VALUES (2)) AS t4 (T2)             GROUP BY t4.T2) AS t7 GROUP BY T2;

original_query: SELECT t4.NAME FROM (SELECT NAME, DEPTNO, DEPTNO - 10 AS DEPTNOMINUS FROM DEPT) AS t4 INNER JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO, SAL + 1 AS f9 FROM EMP GROUP BY DEPTNO, SAL + 1) AS t6 ON t4.DEPTNOMINUS = t6.f9 AND t4.DEPTNO = t6.DEPTNO
rewritten_query: SELECT NAME FROM (SELECT name AS NAME, deptno AS DEPTNO, deptno - 10 AS DEPTNOMINUS         FROM dept         WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1                 FROM (SELECT deptno0, sal + 1 AS f9                         FROM emp AS emp (empno, ename, job, mgr, hiredate, sal, comm, deptno0, slacker)) AS t0                 WHERE DEPTNOMINUS = t0.f9 AND DEPTNO = t0.deptno0)) AS t;

original_query: SELECT t0.JOB, t1.NAME FROM (SELECT EMPNO, ENAME, JOB, MGR, HIREDATE, SAL, COMM, DEPTNO, SLACKER, DEPTNO + EMPNO AS f9 FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A') AS t0 LEFT JOIN (SELECT DEPTNO, NAME, DEPTNO + 5 AS f2 FROM DEPT) AS t1 ON t0.JOB = t1.NAME AND t0.f9 = t1.f2 GROUP BY t0.JOB, t1.NAME
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.JOB, t1.name FROM (SELECT empno AS EMPNO, ename AS ENAME, job AS JOB, mgr AS MGR, hiredate AS HIREDATE, sal AS SAL, comm AS COMM, deptno AS DEPTNO, slacker AS SLACKER, deptno + empno AS f9         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A') AS t0     LEFT JOIN (SELECT deptno0, name, deptno0 + 5 AS f2         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)) AS t1 ON t0.JOB = t1.name AND t0.f9 = t1.f2 GROUP BY t0.JOB, t1.name;

original_query: SELECT CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS DEPTNO, ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME, DEPTNO FROM EMPNULLABLES) AS t6 WHERE DEPTNO = 1 UNION ALL SELECT ENAME FROM (SELECT ENAME, DEPTNO FROM EMPNULLABLES) AS t9 WHERE DEPTNO = 1) AS t12
rewritten_query: SELECT 1 AS DEPTNO0, ENAME FROM (SELECT ename AS ENAME             FROM empnullables             WHERE deptno = 1             UNION ALL             SELECT ename0             FROM empnullables AS empnullables0 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0)             WHERE deptno0 = 1) AS t5;

original_query: SELECT NAME, DDEPTNO, COUNT(*) AS C FROM (SELECT NAME AS NAME, DEPTNO AS DDEPTNO FROM DEPT) AS t3 WHERE NAME = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((NAME, DDEPTNO), NAME)
rewritten_query: SELECT name AS NAME, deptno AS DDEPTNO, COUNT(*) AS C FROM dept WHERE name = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((name, deptno), name);

original_query: SELECT NAME AS NAME, DEPTNO AS DDEPTNO, COUNT(*) AS C FROM DEPT GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((NAME, DEPTNO), NAME) HAVING NAME = 'Charlie'
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT name, deptno, COUNT(*) AS C         FROM dept         GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((deptno, name), name)) AS t0 WHERE name = 'Charlie';

original_query: SELECT t5.JOB FROM (SELECT JOB FROM EMP WHERE ENAME = 'A' GROUP BY JOB) AS t5 RIGHT JOIN (SELECT NAME FROM DEPT GROUP BY NAME) AS t6 ON t5.JOB = t6.NAME GROUP BY t5.JOB
rewritten_query: SELECT t0.job FROM (SELECT job         FROM emp         WHERE ename = 'A'         GROUP BY job) AS t0     RIGHT JOIN (SELECT name         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name) AS t1 ON t0.job = t1.name GROUP BY t0.job;

original_query: SELECT t2.SAL, t2.EXPR1, t5.EXPR2, t9.EXPR3 FROM (SELECT SAL, SUM(COMM) AS EXPR1 FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL) AS t2 INNER JOIN (SELECT SAL, AVG(COMM) AS EXPR2 FROM (SELECT SAL, COMM FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL, COMM) AS t4 GROUP BY SAL) AS t5 ON t2.SAL IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t5.SAL INNER JOIN (SELECT SAL, SUM(SAL) AS EXPR3 FROM (SELECT SAL FROM EMP GROUP BY SAL) AS t8 GROUP BY SAL) AS t9 ON t2.SAL IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t9.SAL
rewritten_query: SELECT t.sal, t.EXPR1, t1.EXPR2, t3.sal10 FROM (SELECT sal, SUM(comm) AS EXPR1         FROM emp         GROUP BY sal) AS t     INNER JOIN (SELECT sal0, AVG(comm0) AS EXPR2         FROM (SELECT sal0, comm0                 FROM emp AS emp0 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0)                 GROUP BY sal0, comm0) AS t0         GROUP BY sal0) AS t1 ON t.sal IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t1.sal0     INNER JOIN (SELECT sal1, sal1 AS sal10         FROM emp AS emp1 (empno1, ename1, job1, mgr1, hiredate1, sal1, comm1, deptno1, slacker1)         GROUP BY sal1) AS t3 ON t.sal IS NOT DISTINCT FROM t3.sal1;

original_query: SELECT * FROM EMP LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM DEPT) AS t ON EMP.DEPTNO = t.DEPTNO ORDER BY EMP.SAL FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
rewritten_query: SELECT * FROM emp     LEFT JOIN dept AS dept0 (deptno0, name) ON emp.deptno = dept0.deptno0 ORDER BY emp.sal FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY;

original_query: SELECT sal, SUM(comm), MIN(comm), SUM(DISTINCT sal) FROM emp GROUP BY sal;
rewritten_query: SELECT sal, MIN(EXPR1) FILTER (WHERE g_0), MIN(EXPR2) FILTER (WHERE g_0), SUM(sal) FILTER (WHERE g_0) FROM (SELECT sal, SUM(comm) AS EXPR1, MIN(comm) AS EXPR2, GROUPING(sal) = 0 AS g_0         FROM emp         GROUP BY sal) AS t0 GROUP BY sal;

original_query: select * from emp e1  where e1.empno > SOME (select deptno from dept);
rewritten_query: SELECT emp.empno, emp.ename, emp.job, emp.mgr, emp.hiredate, emp.sal, emp.comm, emp.deptno, emp.slacker FROM emp,         (SELECT MIN(deptno0) AS m, COUNT(*) AS c, COUNT(deptno0) AS d         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)) AS t0 WHERE emp.empno > t0.m AND t0.c <> 0 OR emp.empno > t0.m AND t0.c <> 0 AND emp.empno > t0.m IS NOT TRUE AND t0.c <= t0.d;

original_query: select e.mgr, d.mgr from emp as e full outer join emp as d on e.mgr = d.mgr group by d.mgr, e.mgr;
rewritten_query: SELECT emp.mgr, emp00.mgr0 FROM emp     FULL JOIN emp AS emp00 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0) ON emp.mgr = emp00.mgr0 GROUP BY emp.mgr, emp00.mgr0;

original_query: select dname, ddeptno, c from              (select name dname, deptno ddeptno, count(*) as c              from dept group by grouping sets ((name,deptno),(name))) t               where dname = 'Charlie';
rewritten_query: SELECT dname, ddeptno, COUNT(*) AS c FROM (SELECT name AS dname, deptno AS ddeptno         FROM dept) AS t WHERE dname = 'Charlie' GROUP BY GROUPING SETS((dname, ddeptno), dname);

original_query: select distinct d.deptno from emp e right outer join dept d on e.deptno = d.deptno;
rewritten_query: SELECT dept0.deptno0 FROM emp     RIGHT JOIN dept AS dept0 (deptno0, name) ON emp.deptno = dept0.deptno0 GROUP BY dept0.deptno0;

original_query: with e2 as (   select empno, case when true then deptno else null end as deptno   from emp) select empno,   deptno in (select deptno from e2 where empno < 20) as d from e2;
rewritten_query: SELECT emp.empno, t6.i IS NOT NULL AND t2.c <> 0 OR t2.ck < t2.c AND NULL AND t2.c <> 0 AND t6.i IS NULL AS d FROM emp     CROSS JOIN (SELECT COUNT(*) AS c, COUNT(deptno1) AS ck         FROM (SELECT empno0, CAST(deptno0 AS INTEGER) AS deptno1                 FROM emp AS emp0 (empno0, ename0, job0, mgr0, hiredate0, sal0, comm0, deptno0, slacker0)) AS t         WHERE empno0 < 20) AS t2     LEFT JOIN (SELECT deptno3, TRUE AS i         FROM (SELECT empno1, CAST(deptno2 AS INTEGER) AS deptno3                 FROM emp AS emp1 (empno1, ename1, job1, mgr1, hiredate1, sal1, comm1, deptno2, slacker1)) AS t3         WHERE empno1 < 20         GROUP BY deptno3) AS t6 ON emp.deptno = t6.deptno3;

original_query: select empno, sum(sal), min(sal), max(sal),  bit_and(distinct sal), bit_or(sal), count(distinct sal),  grouping(deptno) from emp group by empno, deptno;
rewritten_query: SELECT empno, sal, sal, sal, sal, sal, 1, 0 FROM emp;

original_query: select empno, count(mgr) from emp group by empno, deptno;
rewritten_query: SELECT empno, CASE WHEN mgr IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM emp;

original_query: select * from emp where empno > ANY (  select deptno from dept where emp.job = dept.name);
rewritten_query: SELECT emp.empno, emp.ename, emp.job, emp.mgr, emp.hiredate, emp.sal, emp.comm, emp.deptno, emp.slacker FROM emp     INNER JOIN (SELECT MIN(deptno0) AS m, COUNT(*) AS c, COUNT(deptno0) AS d, TRUE AS trueLiteral, name         FROM dept AS dept (deptno0, name)         GROUP BY name) AS t1 ON emp.job = t1.name AND (emp.empno > t1.m AND (t1.trueLiteral IS NULL OR t1.c = 0) IS NOT TRUE OR emp.empno > t1.m AND (t1.trueLiteral IS NULL OR t1.c = 0) IS NOT TRUE AND emp.empno > t1.m IS NOT TRUE AND t1.c > t1.d IS NOT TRUE);

original_query: select deptno c, min(y), max(z) z, sum(r), sum(m) n, sum(x) sal from (    select deptno, ename, sum(sal) x, max(sal) z,       min(sal) y, count(hiredate) m, count(mgr) r    from emp group by deptno, ename) t group by deptno;
rewritten_query: SELECT c, MIN(y), MAX(z) AS z, SUM(r), SUM(m) AS n, SUM(x) AS sal FROM (SELECT deptno AS c, MIN(sal) AS y, MAX(sal) AS z, COUNT(mgr) AS r, COUNT(*) AS m, SUM(sal) AS x         FROM emp         GROUP BY deptno, ename) AS t1 GROUP BY c;

original_query: select coalesce(sum(count_comm), 0) from (   select deptno, count(comm) as count_comm   from emp   group by deptno, mgr) t;
rewritten_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(count_comm), 0) AS f0 FROM (SELECT mgr, deptno, COUNT(*) AS count_comm         FROM emp         GROUP BY mgr, deptno) AS t;
